display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Stefflon Don, Jake Shears and Jamie-Lee O'Donnell join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The chefs face their toughest critic yet when they are challenged to elevate a classic Southern speciality.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Stung by the betrayal of the person who leaked the tape, the once-nurturing Courteney radically transforms into a drill sergeant and calls in the premier choreographer in the country. S1 E7

programme.title: Laid
programme.desc: After Ruby's ex, Richie, confronts her about the sex timeline and his imminent death, she continues looking inward. S1 E4

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: A thrilling new event is unleashed and leaves the Contenders running for their lives. Bradley and Barney host as the gritty Contenders take on the Gladiators for a quarter-final spot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Andy Lee is joined in the studio by Mike Goldstein, Jean Kittson, Hamish Blake and 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: It's the fifth night of the Blind Auditions and artists give it their all, hoping to turn chairs. One braves a Queen classic and a country artist fights for a spot on LeAnn's team.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Bigsies And Littles
programme.desc: Two penguins, Big Blue & Little Blue, explore everyday life with curiosity, kindness, and song, finding big meaning in little moments.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Grace and the son of a prominent theatre critic Frank Bradley get in a fight during a trip to the park, and, to break it up, Fran bops the boy with a baguette. S1 E18

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Sage's headspace crashes.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: While acclimating to purgatory at Split River High, Maddie becomes determined to solve the mystery of her disappearance. S1 E1

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Dr David Sparkhall fears the worst as he takes the tourniquet off a handyman’s blood-soaked arm. Dr Tristan Harding expects multiple injuries in a man who’s fallen off a roof-top balcony.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Jason has become a recluse because of a giant growth on the back of his neck; Marisa hates the red spider veins on her face; Kobe hums to stay calm as student Gili helps Dr. Lee remove a huge bump.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Colette goes on a date with Ceci's cousin Miguel and discovers he may be the key to Ceci's heart; Barb finds out about Greg's lawsuit against the DMV; Vic helps Noa deal with a rude customer. S1 E10

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of Round 5 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Magic host the Steel from Mercury Baypark Arena in Tauranga.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's latest scientific breakthrough makes him feel like a fraud. Meanwhile, Howard's romantic gesture to Bernadette causes Penny to step up her game with Leonard. S7 E6

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second match of Round 5 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Pulse take on the Mystics from Te Rauparaha Arena in Porirua.

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen. (2015)

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Kumail Nanjiani holds Amy Gledhill and Joe Dommett while they ask him about shapes and colour.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: Amanda tries to find a job at the Renaissance Festival until she can plan her next move. David suffers an injury that hinders his performance in the mud pit. S1 E2

programme.title: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
programme.desc: Chicken Man tries to get in good with the Black Mafia but local robbers find a way to disrupt his plans. S1 E2

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: Series Premiere: After Rose and Lissa's plans for the future are upended by tragedy, a new Guardian puts Rose's job at risk. Lissa comes to terms with her new role at court as danger lurks. S1 E1

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Series Premiere: Convicted for a crime she didn't commit and haunted by mysterious Shadows, Lucinda Price is sent to Sword and Cross, an isolated correctional facility. S1 E1

programme.title: 911 Crisis Centre
programme.desc: At a 911 call centre in Cleveland, Ohio, every moment counts - as a team of dispatchers answer and triage the never-ending bombardment of panic-stricken calls.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz has an epic sandcastle competition at the beach, reveals the secret behind his amazing gumboots and learns how to fly a plane!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: What Will I Be Today?
programme.desc: Join your new friends Kauri, Esera and Wing Gai as they go on imaginative adventures to solve every day problems.

programme.title: Bird's Eye View
programme.desc: The flock is in a fluster when they learn their leafy tree is being attacked by the screaming beast! What will they do?

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: Tipua
programme.desc: Dreams and reality keep merging for Ārepa and while the party seemed like a good distraction, Ārepa is starting to realise she can’t escape whatever it is that is happening.

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: The battle rounds continue as Michael Bublé, Niall Horan, Reba McEntire and Snoop Dogg enlist superstar battle advisors to help prepare their artists as they pick their own battle partners.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie blows up at David. Levi fights to save a life. Harper gets an unexpected message.

programme.title: My Impossible House
programme.desc: Season Finale: In Ramsgate, architects Marc and Paula embark on a huge undertaking: transforming a derelict confectionary factory into eight contemporary apartments.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series‎
programme.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work behind the scenes of a hotel that is built downwards into a quarry, with high-tech guest experiences and rooms with windows looking into aquariums.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George and Fiona’s budding relationship is headline news in Weld. Robbie goes on the offensive to save Fiona. S2 E9

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: Continuing on with the challenge to land the 100 kilo billfish, Scott & Mig head out from Raglan for a last ditch effort to nail their fish.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Delivering milk in sustainable, re-usable containers at Kaipaki Dairies; protecting our flora and fauna from Wilding conifers in Whakatipu; and adding value through research at Torere Macadamias.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A South Canterbury family growing organic blackcurrants has created an international business for products they make from the superfood.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: On Puppy School Police pup Alfa loses his marbles, Corrections pupper Bindi puts in some hard play and with the ski season open trainee LandSAR Avalanche pup Nala takes to the slopes. S4 E3

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa present a back-to-basics masterclass for four favourite dishes that include an aubergine parmigiana schnitzel and Lisa's summer strawberry sponge.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Hong Kong Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy invites best friend and chef Simon Rimmer on a trip down memory lane as he shows him the sights of his old family holidays and tastes of nostalgia.

programme.title: Johnny Vegas' Little Shop Of Antiques
programme.desc: Johnny and Bev attend an auction of studio ceramics. As a trained ceramicist, Johnny's in his element, but will his passion for the pots prove costly?

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Four experts match wits and dodge witticisms from host Tom Gleeson. This week’s topics: Wally Lewis, Mel Brooks, Mushrooms, and Stephen Sondheim. Only the hardest will survive!

programme.title: The Chase New Zealand
programme.desc: It’s game on as Ash, Andy, Wendy, Kahu, a team of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, an international quiz genius. Hosted by Paul Henry.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The search for the most spectacular entertainers to hit these shores continues in Blackpool as more hopefuls are welcomed by award-winning hosts Ant & Dec and face the judges.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: The search for the most spectacular entertainers to hit these shores continues in Blackpool as more hopefuls are welcomed by award-winning hosts Ant & Dec and face the judges.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Mary finds herself courted by two suitors. S1 E8

programme.title: Sully
programme.desc: The story of Chesley Sullenberger, an American pilot who became a hero after landing his damaged plane on the Hudson River in order to save the flight's passengers and crew. Starring Tom Hanks. (2016)

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1989. Niall is struggling at university when he invites Ruben to join him and his flatmates for freshers' week. What begins with excitement ends in devastating consequences. S1 E2

programme.title: Totally Completely Fine
programme.desc: In the wake of a tragedy at the ledge, Vivian abandons her post and falls back into old habits. Meanwhile, John takes Hendrix on a brothers' golfing trip. S1 E5

programme.title: Lockerbie: A Search For Truth
programme.desc: After 12 long years, the Lockerbie trial begins. But as it unfolds, Jim begins questioning the official evidence against the suspects. S1 E3

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Philip face the eye of the storm as they battle the elements to put on a special dinner party. Abbie gets her hands dirty upcycling a kitchen.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: A high-tech, sustainable vegetable growing operation in Tasman; developing a new kiwifruit orchard in Bay of Plenty; and a Marlborough farm offering hunting, tourism and fine dining to its visitors.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: Meet the people and pooches of NZ's esteemed doggy daycare Barkley Manor. A rescue dog works through some teenage anxiety, a bulldog is off to school, and schnoodes enjoy some music.

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: National treasure Ainsley Harriott challenges some of Britain's best chefs to make inspiring meals from ingredients available in and around a stunning selection of National Trust properties.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: A mysterious vial of liquid puts Customs on high alert; Immigration officers play a confusing game of “he said, she said” with a traveller from Columbia.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Lorraine Kelly, Julian Clary and AJ Odudu join Jo and Tom for a fondue review of Chocolate Week. Whose tart was doomed from the start, and did anyone have a meltdown?

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Texas and Mexico and joins the US Border Patrol - who pick up migrants who have illegally crossed the Rio Grande river in search of a new life - on the way.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the fifth and final leg of his journey, Simon travels across Central America from the Caribbean to the Pacific by beginning in Belize and finishing his trip in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the third leg of his journey, Simon Reeve is in the United States and travelling down the length of California to explore the land of the giant redwoods and the West Coast.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels through Texas and Mexico and joins the US Border Patrol - who pick up migrants who have illegally crossed the Rio Grande river in search of a new life - on the way.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the fifth and final leg of his journey, Simon travels across Central America from the Caribbean to the Pacific by beginning in Belize and finishing his trip in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Off-the-wall space comedy. Holly finds a pod which Rimmer believes to contain the body of a Quagaar warrior, a species with green hair and six breasts.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: More escapades in space on board the Red Dwarf. Lister explores Kochanski's quarters and tries to find her hologram disc - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Space-set comedy. When two Rimmers appear, any thoughts that they might co-exist in harmony are soon put to rest and one of them must be switched off - but which one.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Off-the-wall space comedy. Holly finds a pod which Rimmer believes to contain the body of a Quagaar warrior, a species with green hair and six breasts.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: More escapades in space on board the Red Dwarf. Lister explores Kochanski's quarters and tries to find her hologram disc - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Space-set comedy. When two Rimmers appear, any thoughts that they might co-exist in harmony are soon put to rest and one of them must be switched off - but which one.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Off-the-wall space comedy. Holly finds a pod which Rimmer believes to contain the body of a Quagaar warrior, a species with green hair and six breasts.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: More escapades in space on board the Red Dwarf. Lister explores Kochanski's quarters and tries to find her hologram disc - with disastrous results.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Space-set comedy. When two Rimmers appear, any thoughts that they might co-exist in harmony are soon put to rest and one of them must be switched off - but which one.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the space comedy! Meet the crew of the Red Dwarf: sole surviving human Lister, hologram Rimmer, and a lifeform evolved from Lister's cat.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Classic space comedy. Having accelerated for a mere three million years, Red Dwarf breaks through the light barrier and sets off a series of weird occurrences.

programme.title: Red Dwarf
programme.desc: Interstellar laughs from the Red Dwarf crew. Lister is desperate to see dead officer Kochanski once more and begs Rimmer to bring her back as a hologram.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a picturesque French castle, the ruins of a Kansas City hospital, an ancient Turkish city, and an island in Ireland that brought its inhabitants closer to God.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a complex in Georgia pointing into deep space that almost discovered a signal from aliens.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Hartwood, a haunting facility in Scotland, ruins of an ancient city in Iraq and a scandal hit town in New Mexico.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a royal retreat caught in a web of corruption, an engineering marvel hidden behind the Niagara Falls in Canada, and a subterranean treasure.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a picturesque French castle, the ruins of a Kansas City hospital, an ancient Turkish city, and an island in Ireland that brought its inhabitants closer to God.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a complex in Georgia pointing into deep space that almost discovered a signal from aliens.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Hartwood, a haunting facility in Scotland, ruins of an ancient city in Iraq and a scandal hit town in New Mexico.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a royal retreat caught in a web of corruption, an engineering marvel hidden behind the Niagara Falls in Canada, and a subterranean treasure.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Another slice of the legendary comedy duo. Filmed at the peak of their powers in 1977, this show includes Stop, You're Killing Me, and Ronnie C's regular meandering monologue.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Messrs Barker and Corbett from 1977 with some classic comedy, including Teach Yourself PC, Stop, You're Killing Me, and naturally, their regular hilarious musical skit.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Superb vintage comedy from 1977 with the much-loved duo. The riotous sketches from Messrs Barker and Corbett include their thriller spoof, Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The legendary duo in their pomp. This episode from 1977 includes the classic Minister for Having Referendums on Absolutely Everything sketch, as well as Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: The comedy duo legends at the peak of their powers from 1977 with sketches including The Limerick Writers, and the continuing saga of Stop, You're Killing Me.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Another slice of the legendary comedy duo. Filmed at the peak of their powers in 1977, this show includes Stop, You're Killing Me, and Ronnie C's regular meandering monologue.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Messrs Barker and Corbett from 1977 with some classic comedy, including Teach Yourself PC, Stop, You're Killing Me, and naturally, their regular hilarious musical skit.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a mathematical genius and discover he was working on a device that could make it possible to hack into any computer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. After an explosion destroys a murder victim's apartment, Carrie's memory of the crime scene leads her and Al to question a prison inmate.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdoch's investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Murdoch and Choi must intercept a spirited trouble-seeking drunk before his foes find him.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the murder of a mathematical genius and discover he was working on a device that could make it possible to hack into any computer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthy's friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set drama, starring Mark Williams.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. After an explosion destroys a murder victim's apartment, Carrie's memory of the crime scene leads her and Al to question a prison inmate.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A reggae band's reunion concert is blighted when the guitarist is found dead in his dressing room, with a gun in his hand and the door locked from the inside.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A manhunt for two dangerous brothers, whose crimes left long-term scars on a community and a legacy of mistrust for the police, reveals regrets that still haunt Vince.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mrs McCarthy's friend is the latest villager to die in her sleep, and Father Brown soon senses something sinister is afoot. Fifties-set drama, starring Mark Williams.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: ..: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. A death in the Saint Marie Heritage Society suggests that this cosy group could be less amicable than it seems.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah bumps into Charlie and Rex on a day off, Charlie recounts the first case that he and Rex ever solved together.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After a rare humanoid skull is stolen, Murdoch's investigation reveals a few suspects and a dead potential buyer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Murdoch and Choi must intercept a spirited trouble-seeking drunk before his foes find him.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates an explosion at a suffrage rally attended by Dr Talbot (Claire Goose) and Julia that leads to the death of an unidentified man.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a dockworker is assassinated, Murdoch pursues elusive witness Robert Parker and learns anti-union thugs may be involved. Crime drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A death at an investment event leads Crabtree to a savvy visionary who happens to be the father he never knew, but Murdoch suspects he may be culpable.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: When a famous magician does the ultimate disappearing act and vanishes into thin air, Eliza is hired to investigate - despite the fact that Duke is already on the case.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza and William go undercover after a string of crimes all point to one restaurant, and Eliza bumps into a girl who made her life a misery growing up.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The superb mystery series starring Martin Shaw and set in 1960s Northumberland. The body of a pop music-loving schoolgirl is found in Pinnock Woods.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the Cotswolds of the 1950s. When the father of a young writer is found dead, tension mounts against Travellers.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric in the mystery series based on the short stories of GK Chesterton. At Hotel Cuba, the dish of the day is death.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. Brown investigates a group of people all seeking to reinvent themselves.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric of the Cotswolds. Brown becomes embroiled in an art heist masterminded by his adversary Flambeau.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: When a billionaire is found decapitated, Fitz and Arch find themselves in a classic 'whodunnit', looking for the killer in the victim's family.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: When an American PI is arrested for murder, Frank and Lu set off in search of a valuable muscle car.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: A manhunt for two dangerous brothers, whose crimes left long-term scars on a community and a legacy of mistrust for the police, reveals regrets that still haunt Vince.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are put to the test when a celebrated artist is poisoned in her studio under confounding circumstances.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: New Year's Eve celebrations are cut short when a masked man stabs a woman in her own home. Jack and the team must uncover his identity before he strikes again.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: With the blitz taking its toll, Britain had to keep it's manufacturing going. Shadow factories were born and were crucial in the production of ammunition.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit the Sage Gateshead, where they examine a phonograph and a tablecloth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce introduces finds from Lanhydrock in Cornwall and Bodnant Garden in north Wales, including a jewellery collection and a rare painting.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some emerging sporting classics from the far east when three Datsun Zs appear, and an unusual lot arrives that run on caterpillar tracks not wheels. S3 Ep.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Fiat X1/9 / Austin A60 Cambridge: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek sells vehicles from TV show Heartbeat, love for an Austin Cambridge, and a sporty Italian number getting rehomed.

programme.title: The Great War In Numbers
programme.desc: The story of World War I, told through revealing data. Around 25,000 miles of trenches were cut as the sides dug in and UK factories built 30,000 aircraft a year.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, predators with a grasp of communication that has led scientists to conclude they're as intelligent as chimpanzees.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and sperm whales hunting for squid deep beneath the surface.

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: With the blitz taking its toll, Britain had to keep it's manufacturing going. Shadow factories were born and were crucial in the production of ammunition.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher decides that Harris must be put on trial for stealing from another prisoner. You can't trust anyone.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Classic prison-set sitcom with the great Ronnie Barker and a guest appearance from David Jason. Fletch decides to help an old lag who has been in prison for 17 years.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The immortal prison-set sitcom. When Godber studies to get another O-level before leaving jail, Fletch cannot understand his appetite for all the hard work.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The stories of conservation heroes fighting to save the world's wildlife, from exploring remote jungles to going undercover to disrupt the illegal ivory trade.

programme.title: A Perfect Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at the effect human activity is having, revealing how the carbon dioxide being produced is destabilising life on Earth.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want a classic Morris Minor, and they find an ex-police car in a lovely shade of blue. But the seller wants them to bid online - they can't pay and take it away.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo head to Wales to see who can create the most profit on items, including an oil dispenser, fire grate, chaise longue and even a catamaran.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Experience the harsh realities of life at sea with Scottish trawler fishermen. A team goes extreme crabbing in the worst weather seen in the programme's history - hold on tight.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: American History's Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley shows how the history of the American Civil War has been retold to promote freedom and equality but also hatred and division.

programme.title: American History's Biggest Fibs with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley reveals the myths and deceptions told following the United States' emergence as a superpower after the Second World War.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus head to the West Country to buy a Golf GTI. Gus hates it on sight, but Will is smitten. They soon discover why the car is laid up - it has no engine.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus look to make some quick cash as they fix and wrap a Toyota MR2 MK2. It's quick and it's cheap, but it's the lowest spec out there and it looks dowdy.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus take on a Citroen BX with no brakes, bad paintwork and a rodent infestation - and they've got five days to fix it and flog it.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will hunt down an affordable Italian car, and eventually find an Alfa Romeo 155 hiding in a barn. Making space for an inspection proves a challenge.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Fletcher decides that Harris must be put on trial for stealing from another prisoner. You can't trust anyone.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Classic prison-set sitcom with the great Ronnie Barker and a guest appearance from David Jason. Fletch decides to help an old lag who has been in prison for 17 years.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: The immortal prison-set sitcom. When Godber studies to get another O-level before leaving jail, Fletch cannot understand his appetite for all the hard work.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: It's Robbie's toughest trip yet as he battles through water weed on the Bradley Arm and gets stuck in silt on the Ridgacre Branch.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming encounters a leaky lock pound on the Perry Barr Flight and gets marooned in the mud before travelling under Spaghetti Junction in Birmingham.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: In the first episode of the series, Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greece's capital of Athens and meets an extraordinary cast of characters.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning in a rocky reef and tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in seagrass.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live on the coast, including sea lions hunting for tuna, puffins bringing food back to their young, and a strange species of fish that hates water.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: It's a battle of little and large as the team get creative with a 1996 Fiat 126 and then run their own consumer test on a 2004 Bentley Continental GT.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek goes to pick up a veteran 1904 Swift, there's an emotional farewell to a 1980s Bedford HA van, and a Toyota Corona finds a new home.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The crew head to Germany to collect a maintenance machine so large it needs to be loaded onto two trucks. Eric and Chris oversee a diesel-engine exchange.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Royal Highland Fusilier, a 100-ton Deltic diesel engine, must be hauled from Leicestershire to Wirksworth in Cheshire.
